task:

Change 1 — line 19-20, wrong archived-priority path. The parenthetical currently reads: "(Priority archived to `priorities/zArchive/v2/base-and-extension-personas.md`.)". That path does not exist. The file actually lives at `cocoder/zArchive/priorities/v2/base-and-extension-personas.md`. Repoint the parenthetical to `cocoder/zArchive/priorities/v2/base-and-extension-personas.md`.

Change 2 — the '## v1 leftovers (frozen reference)' paragraph (lines 30-33). It currently names `_archived-v1/`, `custom/`, `playbooks/`, `prompts/`, and `PORT-NOTES.md`. Verified via `ls cocoder/personas/`: only `custom/` still exists; `_archived-v1/`, `playbooks/`, `prompts/`, and `PORT-NOTES.md` are all gone. Rewrite the paragraph so it references only `custom/` as the sole surviving pre-rebuild v1 artifact (kept as reference pending cleanup). Keep the prose style consistent with the rest of the file.

Acceptance: both references in cocoder/personas/AGENTS.md resolve against the live tree (verify with `ls`/`find` that `cocoder/zArchive/priorities/v2/base-and-extension-personas.md` exists and that `custom/` is the only one of the listed leftovers still present).
